question: Right now, where would you rather be?
dek: Seven zones, seven moments on the Sky Clock. One pick — which way would you go?

options.label: El Segundo · sun on the Strand
options.hint: marine layer burning off, Pacific breeze kicking up

options.label: Mallorca · passeig on the harbour
options.hint: 21°C, almond blossom fading, boats coming in

options.label: Istanbul · meyhane, raki slow
options.hint: Judas trees erupting on the Bosphorus

outcomeAction: Winning zone gets a featured dek on the Sky Clock.
author: mike
source: chat 2026-04-20 — 'still almost small vignettes to communicate the moment, keep thinking what's unique what would people like to read and pair with some type of polls'
